note: Up to about 20% of the triennial feed after the last comment still indicates proximity to the active edge; beyond about 40% the user has been away from a substantial share of the era.
Up to 5 distinct posts in a triennium indicates sparse participation breadth; more than 10 distinct posts indicates a broad and recurring presence across the era.
Short reactive comments up to 5 words, more elaborated comments above 12 words.
Variation up to about 15 posts-between-comments still reflects relatively regular spacing; above 50 the participation pattern is clearly bursty and episodic.
